choices.text: WBS must contain 100% of project scope. All deliverables represented; no overlap; sum of children = parent. Missing scope is common error → underestimate + budget overrun. Levels typically: 1 (project) → 5 (activities, 8-80 hrs each).

CSI MasterFormat 50 divisions: Div 3 Concrete, Div 5 Metals, Div 9 Finishes, Div 23 HVAC, Div 26 Electrical. Used in specs + estimates. UniFormat (substructure/shell/interiors/services) alternative for early estimates.
